name: republish
summary: Republishes point clouds between different transport encodings.
overview: The republish node subscribes to a point cloud topic using a configurable input transport and republishes PointCloud2 data via a specified output transport or all available transports. It enables on-the-fly conversion between encodings such as raw, draco, or zlib.

parameters.name: in_transport
parameters.summary: Transport type used when subscribing to the input point cloud topic.

parameters.name: out_transport
parameters.summary: Transport type for output; if empty, all available transports are used.

interfaces.summary: Incoming point cloud stream using the specified input transport.
Republished point cloud stream using the specified output transport(s).
